hero_subhead: We design and build small-batch goods for people who appreciate the craft behind the object.
about_headline: Made by hand, made to last.
about_body: We started Maple & Co. out of a small workshop in 2018. Every piece we make is designed to outlive trends, built from materials we can trace, and finished with the kind of care that disappears into the object itself. We're a small team — we like it that way.
services_intro: Three categories. All made to order.
service1_desc: Custom tables, shelving, and storage built from hardwood and solid joinery. Lead time 6–10 weeks.
service2_desc: Candles, ceramics, and textiles. Small runs, often seasonal. Follow our newsletter.
service3_desc: Corporate and personal gifting. We work with you to design something that doesn't look like a gift set.
contact_body: We don't have a form. Just email us directly — we respond within a day.
